name: Price / Rate Checker
description: Monitors a price or rate and alerts you when it changes significantly

data.label: Fetch price
data.config:
# Replace this with your actual price source
# Example: exchange rate
curl -s "https://open.er-api.com/v6/latest/USD" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f\"USD/EUR: {d['rates']['EUR']:.4f}\")
print(f\"USD/NOK: {d['rates']['NOK']:.4f}\")
print(f\"Updated: {d['time_last_update_utc']}\")
"

data.label: Price Analyst
data.systemPrompt: You track prices and alert on significant changes. Compare today's price from the tool with the stored history. If the change is more than 1%, mention it prominently. Always show the current rate and the change since last check. Keep the message short — 2-3 lines max.
